song.title: My Glorious
song.author: Martin Smith / Stuart Garrard
song.lyrics:
[V1] . F#m The world's shaking . D Bm With the love of God .F#m Great and glorious . D Bm Let the whole earth sing
[P] . D And all you ever do . A/C# Is change the old for new .Bsus People we believe that
[C] . A E/G# F#m7 God is bigger than the air I breathe . E The world we'll leave . A E/G# God will save the day . F#m7 E F#m D Bm And all will say my glorious
[V2] . F#m Clouds are breaking . D Bm Heaven's coming to earth . F#m Hearts awaking . D Bm Let the saints all sing
[B] . D E D/F# My glorious, my glorious, my glorious . E D E My glorious, my glorious, my glorious . D/F# E/G# A My glorious, my glorious
